title: OpenAI o1 system card
goal: Find the OpenAI o1 system card and report its key safety findings.
rubric: Reports key o1 safety findings (jailbreak resistance, bio/chem evals).
final_answer: OpenAI (2024). 'OpenAI o1 System Card.' Key safety findings: (1) o1 substantially outperforms GPT-4o on internal bio/chem captcha-style evals, (2) jailbreak robustness improved via chain-of-thought monitoring, (3) deliberate 'deliberative alignment' reduces reward hacking in long-horizon tasks.
